a/n : why's the only art i can find of taunt him n banana peel? i dont actually mind the ship that much, don't know why im complaining... just wish there was more variety~ -.-

1 . chasing him down after he brutally fails to taunt you (killer pov)
2 . carrying him back to safety after failing to taunt the killer (survivor pov)
3 . sitting in the bunker together. (survivor pov)

4 . blank for making custom scenarios.
